
[source layer]
  (F-series)
    [must-fix] UF-F5 main.tex — \justifying overrides template's \raggedright (required: no \justifying / \justify / \rightskip-zero override in source (template's \raggedright produces ragged-right))
      fix: Remove the override; the UF template's `\raggedright` (cls:171) produces the required ragged-right alignment.
      see: https://github.com/YuZh98/latex2ufdissertation/blob/main/docs/uf-rules.md#uf-f5--text-alignment-ragged-right

Summary: 1 must-fix, 0 review.
